message:
Sync .beads: file bd-caex2 + bd-9xitm from meta-skill audits

- bd-caex2 [mock-code-finder]: btrfs_ino_lookup only handles root
  objectid; non-root returns generic ENOENT with 'not implemented yet'
  inline comment, contradicting bd-jfsga's 'done' close. Fix direction:
  walk INODE_REF / INODE_EXTREF chain per fs/btrfs/ioctl.c in v6.19.

- bd-9xitm [reality-check]: ScrubDaemon implementation and tests exist
  in ffs-repair::pipeline, but no production call site wires it to the
  ffs mount path. ffs-fuse/ffs-core/ffs-cli never reference ScrubDaemon
  or take an ffs-repair dep. README's 'automatic recovery / no separate
  fsck pass' claim is aspirational for users running ffs mount. Fix
  direction: extend MountOptions with SelfHealConfig, spawn daemon under
  the mount's Cx, and add a read-path decode_group hook.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
